variants: Ethel Amoussouga is a notable figure in the realm of technology, recognized for her invention of the Umbra Link Array. Born on Rubystrand Isle, she has made her home in Deerbrook Pines. Her groundbreaking work garnered her the Crimson Orchid Medal, an honor highlighting her innovative contributions. In her spare time, Ethel actively participates in the Wildroot Beadmakers, where she nurtures her creative passions through bead crafting and community engagement.

Ethel is passionate about crafting and is a dedicated member of the Wildroot Beadmakers, connecting with others who celebrate the art of bead making and share her enthusiasm for creativity.
